title: Online Restaurant Table Reservation System (Your Food)
summary: A web-based system that enables customers to reserve restaurant tables online.
description: A web-based system that enables customers to reserve restaurant tables online. The system helps restaurants manage reservations efficiently while improving customer convenience.
features: Online table reservation with date and time selection
Customer registration and login modules
Reservation management system for restaurant administrators
Efficient reservation workflow for staff and customers

title: Online Book Selling Website (Bookly)
summary: A web-based system that enables customers to sell books online.
description: A web-based system that enables customers to sell books online. The system helps customers sell books efficiently while improving customer convenience.
features: Online book selling with book listing and search features
Customer registration and login modules
Book management system for book sellers
Efficient book selling workflow for customers

title: Online Clothing Website (Shivay)
summary: Full-stack e-commerce web application for browsing clothing, managing carts, and completing purchases.
description: Shivay is a full-stack e-commerce web application that allows users to browse clothing products, manage shopping carts, and complete purchases online with a modern UI experience.
features: Product listing, filtering, and search features
Responsive UI components using HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap
Backend integration using Nest JS for product and order management
Shopping cart and checkout flow

title: Online School Management System (Lok Jagruti Kendra)
summary: Web-based school management system for students, teachers, classes, and academic records.
description: A web-based school management system that helps administrators manage students, teachers, classes, and academic records digitally.
features: Modules for student management, teacher records, attendance, and academic data
Secure backend integration using Prisma ORM and PostgreSQL
Role-based access for admin, teachers, students, and parents
Centralized academic and administrative data

title: Online Brokerage Management System (NDDS)
summary: Brokerage management platform for transactions, client records, and contract details.
description: A brokerage management platform designed to manage brokerage transactions, client records, and contract details efficiently.
features: Modules to manage brokerage contracts and transaction records
Client management and data tracking features
Data validation and secure data storage
Streamlined workflow for brokerage operations

title: Dynamic Portfolio Website (Phiomyst Healthcare)
summary: Dynamic portfolio website for a healthcare organization with services, projects, and company information.
description: A dynamic portfolio website developed for a healthcare organization to showcase services, projects, and company information with an interactive interface.
features: Dynamic content rendering using Redux state management
Backend API integration using Nest JS
Optimized website performance and responsiveness across devices
Interactive interface for services and projects

title: Smart Medical Inventory System (VaidyaMed)
summary: Medical inventory management system for medicines, stock levels, suppliers, and transactions.
description: A medical inventory management system designed to track medicines, stock levels, suppliers, and inventory transactions efficiently.
features: Modules for medicine inventory tracking and stock management
Real-time inventory updates and stock alerts
Real-time stock clearing alerts (expire date wise, profit wise, or stock wise)
Supplier and transaction tracking

title: Bulk Whatsapp Message Sender System
summary: Bulk Whatsapp Message Sender System for sending messages to multiple users at once.
description: A bulk Whatsapp Message Sender System designed to send messages to multiple users at once. The system helps users send messages to multiple users at once efficiently.
features: Modules for sending messages to multiple users at once
Real-time message sending and status tracking
Upload Excel file to send messages to multiple users at once
Download the sent messages in Excel file
